title: The EU just fined AliExpress €550M, its biggest DSA penalty yet
summary: Alibaba’s AliExpress has been hit with a €550 million ($629 million) fine from the European Union. Shein had 156 million and Temu 130 million. “One in five Europeans say they shop once a month from Shein, Temu and AliExpress,” she said.
